## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (describe):

## How to test

List the steps used to verify this change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the repository conventions
- [ ] I tested my changes locally
- [ ] I did not include secrets or credentials
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed
